svg.text: LaborAid Technology Stack Overview
PRESENTATION
React 19 | TypeScript | Vite 6 | Tailwind CSS | Radix UI | React Router 7 | TanStack Query | Lucide icons
Single SPA serves user portal + admin portal | Port 5320 | Warm-paper design system
APPLICATION
Python 3.11 | FastAPI 0.115 | Uvicorn | Pydantic v2 | SQLAlchemy 2 async | Alembic | SSE streaming
REST + OpenAPI /api/docs | Port 8010 | JWT auth (python-jose) | Modular routers
AI AND ALGORITHMS
Text LLM: DeepSeek API (configurable) | Vision OCR: Qwen-VL (DashScope) | Embeddings: all-MiniLM-L6-v2
LangChain + Chroma | LEAP | MICE | Graph-RAG | SAGD (Jinja2/docxtpl) | Supervisor Agent pipeline
Admin configures keys - users never enter API credentials
DATA AND STORAGE
SQLite (dev) / PostgreSQL (prod) | ChromaDB vectors | Redis (optional cache)
Local file uploads + material vault quota
EXTERNAL INTEGRATIONS
DeliLegal law search | Qichacha enterprise | Chinese Law MCP | Official guidance links
Pluggable via admin API config panel
DEVOPS AND QUALITY
Git monorepo | start-laboraid.bat | ESLint + Prettier | Diagram-as-code (Mermaid + SVG figures)
Design principle: lightweight deploy for legal-aid demos, cloud LLM for intelligence, local data for privacy
